cancel(uint256).notice: Cancel escrow and refund payer. Can be called by either party.         Payer can cancel anytime while Active.         Agent can cancel anytime while Active (declining the task).

create(address,address,uint256,uint256).notice: Create an escrow with ERC-20 tokens.

createETH(address,uint256).notice: Create an escrow with native ETH.

reclaim(uint256).notice: If deadline has passed and task is still Active (not released),         payer can reclaim funds. This protects payers from unresponsive agents.

release(uint256).notice: Payer confirms task complete — agent can now withdraw.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Agent withdraws funds after payer releases.
